context_text: <A> so the seasons people get ill when the seasons change is the topic right / <B> uh-huh / <A> um i don't know i'm i'm from i grew up in new york and ah so it's a pretty drastic change of seasons up there / <B> exactly / <A> and so like ah you know during during the winter usually when the winter season would hit um remember it as summer / <B> right / <A> lotta people would get sick they say the average person gets sick once a year maybe twice a year i don't know / <B> really
